steps.title: Read the graph direction
steps.content: All four choices have $y$-intercept $-1$. The graph falls from left to right, so the slope must be negative.

steps.title: Find the slope
steps.content:
Using the marked points $(0,-1)$ and $(8,-6)$, the slope is
$$
\frac{-6-(-1)}{8-0}=-\frac{5}{8}
$$
So the function has slope $-\frac{5}{8}$ and intercept $-1$.

steps.title: Match the line
steps.content: The matching equation is $$ f(x)=-\frac{5}{8}x-1 $$ The answer is C.
